Refactor auth middleware

180 const session = req.session
181 if (!session) return null
182 return validate(session.token)
183 }
  • reviewer-alice today

    Potential race condition here — what if validate throws?

  • dev-bob today

    Good catch, I'll wrap it.

12 export type Session = { token: string }
  • reviewer-alice yesterday

    nit: Token alias would be nice.
